NOTICE OF MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT TAWFIK, HEIDI W TAWFIK, HUSSEIN H HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS HEIDI TAWFIK AND HUSSEIN TAWFIK'S MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THERE IS NO STATUTORY BASIS FOR A MOTION TO DISMISS ON THE BASIS ARGUED. TO THE EXTENT IT IS INTENDED AS A DEMURRER, IT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1112 OR 3.1320 AND LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C), AND WOULD FAIL ON THE MERITS BECAUSE IT RELIES ON FACTS EXTRANEOUS TO THE COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
